description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building with a modern, rectangular design set on a plot with a striped ground pattern. The structure features a low-pitched, metal gable roof and a prominent covered entryway, with a driveway leading up to a carport or garage. The front facade is defined by a series of evenly spaced windows and a small porch area, while the sides and rear are more private, with fewer windows and more solid wall surfaces. Mature trees are positioned around the building, providing shade and a sense of integration with the landscape. The overall aesthetic is minimalist, with clean lines and a focus on horizontal proportions. The materials appear to be primarily concrete, metal, and glass, with some wood elements likely present in the porch or window frames.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a metal gable roof, prominent entryway, and striped landscaping, surrounded by mature trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch, driveway, and symmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the carport/garage, dense tree coverage, and the elongated shape of the building.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a more private facade with fewer windows and a continuation of the striped ground pattern.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with dense trees obscuring part of the structure and a clear view of the roof's shape.
